creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
guess who I hang out for breakfast at @charmingcavehotel ✨🥞🍅🧀🐱🎈✨ watch to the end to find out 

📍#cappadocia morning is magical with the hot air balloons 🎈 filling the sky & I get to watch it at @charmingcavehotel terraces has great unblock view either on the private write rug or the beautiful two tier brown rugs with amazing breakfast spread & meet the cute resident cats 🐈 
do stay more nights because sometimes balloons don’t take off due to weather

thanks @tiebowtie a talented Istanbul female photographer 🇹🇷📸 for recommending this hotel & make make sure to book her for gorgeous shots in Istanbul 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #charmingcavehotel #göreme #turkiye #turkey
